patches.hypothesis: The bug is due to incorrect assignment of the outlinePaint parameter in the constructor. The outlinePaint is being assigned the value of the paint parameter instead of the outlinePaint parameter.
patches.changes:
- super(paint, stroke, paint, stroke, alpha);
+ super(paint, stroke, outlinePaint, outlineStroke, alpha);
patches.diff:
- super(paint, stroke, paint, stroke, alpha);
+ super(paint, stroke, outlinePaint, outlineStroke, alpha);
